Closure is a relation created from adding elements to a relation so that it has one of the following three traits

[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Closure]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Closure]][[sn:Closure]]# [[Reflexive relation]]
# [[Symmetric]]
# [[Transitive]]

You are adding the minimum amount of ordered pairs necessary for the trait being added. 

There is no antisymmetric closure for two reasons:
# you cannot add elements to give the property, you have to take out elements
# there are multiple ways you can take out elements to induce the property. So no single one like there are closures for the three other properties
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
